name: DIRTT ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS LTD
business: DIRTT designs and manufactures adaptable, sustainable interior spaces using a system of physical products and digital tools. It sells primarily through a network of Construction Partners and directly through its Construction Services team. Revenue is derived almost entirely from projects in North America across commercial, healthcare, education, government, and other sectors.

exposures.sentence: DIRTT designs and manufactures adaptable, sustainable spaces where people work, learn, and heal.

catalysts.sentence: The program is expected to be completed in 2026.
The next survey is scheduled for the second quarter of 2026.
The last disbursement of C$5.0 million is expected to be in the second half of the year, subject to certain conditions.

The Renewed Shares NCIB permits DIRTT to acquire up to 9,593,878 of its common shares. All purchases will be made on the open market through the facilities of the Toronto Stock Exchange ( TSX ) at the market price of common shares at the time of acquisition. Any common shares acquired through the Renewed Shares NCIB will be immediately cancelled.
The Seventh Amended RBC Facility matures on November 30, 2026 and is subject to the same borrowing base terms as the previous facility.
